Cooper Flagg's Historic 45-Point Game vs. Lakers Solidifies NBA Rookie of the Year Case | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Cooper Flagg, Dallas Mavericks rookie, scored 45 points with 9 assists and 8 rebounds in a 134-128 win over the Los Angeles Lakers on April 5, 2026, marking back-to-back 40+ point games as the first rookie since Allen Iverson in 1996-97[1][2][4].
